items.name: [PBR] Monochrome Hannya, Japanese traditional mask
items.description:
✨✨PBR, SHINY HANNYA MASK VERSION

The ' Golden Hannya, Japanese traditional mask ': https://www.roblox.com/catalog/113952831023710

The ' White Hannya, Japanese traditional mask ': https://www.roblox.com/catalog/123285551927084

The ' Red Hannya, Japanese traditional mask ': https://www.roblox.com/catalog/117070094831598

Ghost:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/91327912247318

Black:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/102806127354707

この悪鬼の名前は貴女です • 日本の伝説にすんでいます。

The Hannya mask with its sharp fangs and straight horns is probably the best known of all Noh masks. 
That wooden, red mask is related to Japanese traditional folklore. The hannya is a mask that represents a female 「貴女  •（きじょ • kijo）」demon woman.
Those kind of 「鬼  •（おに  •  Oni）」always have been associated with their manifesting in evil, vengeful propensities. 

Made by wyssion
All rights reserved.

More from Aluvion UGC: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Aluvion+UGC&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=3&IncludeNotForSale
